name: google-workspace
description: Google Workspace integration extension — unified access to Google Docs, Sheets, Drive, Calendar, and Gmail.

capabilities.docs: Create, edit, and export Google Docs
capabilities.drive: Search, retrieve, and upload files on Google Drive
capabilities.calendar: Create and retrieve Google Calendar events

note: Create a service account or OAuth client in Google Cloud Console and enable the required APIs.
author: Zero-Employee Orchestrator Team
